title: Literal translation procedure which comes under the direct translation strategy

evidence.raw_text:
Rights that each spouse can expect from the other, particularly sexual rights but 
also the rights to society, comfort, and affection .  
nuptial. ADJ. Related to marriage (p. 342). Whereas, حقوق زوجية  means “Nuptial rights: The rig
evidence.clean_text: Thus, زوجية which is translated as ‘matrimonial’, ‘conjugal’, and ‘m arital’ – indicates literal translation procedure which comes under the direct translation strategy, whereby the translated words are equivalent to the Arabic word.
